summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VistoriaPro property inspection app. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI professionally designed and fully responsive. All core inspection workflows working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: FAB button click blocked by Emergent badge overlay on some screens
ui_bugs.workaround: Can navigate directly via URL or use force click

passed_tests: All 9 Backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
New inspection form with all fields
Checklist navigation with 6 room tabs (Geral, Sala, Cozinha, Banheiro, Área Externa, Quarto)
Photo upload button and file input
Inspection detail page with complete data display
Professional design with slate/blue/white color scheme
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor FAB button overlay issue with Emergent badge. All core functionality is working perfectly.
